rootHelpText:
[1m[91m🦞 OpenClaw[39m[22m [93m2026.4.1[39m [31m(53c793d)[39m [31m—[39m [31mClaws out, commit in—let's ship something mildly responsible.[39m

[1m[91mUsage:[39m[22m openclaw [options] [command]

[1m[91mOptions:[39m[22m
  [93m--container <name>[39m   Run the CLI inside a running Podman/Docker container named <name> (default: env
                       OPENCLAW_CONTAINER)
  [93m--dev[39m                Dev profile: isolate state under ~/.openclaw-dev, default gateway port 19001, and shift derived
                       ports (browser/canvas)
  [93m-h, --help[39m           Display help for command
  [93m--log-level <level>[39m  Global log level override for file + console (silent|fatal|error|warn|info|debug|trace)
  [93m--no-color[39m           Disable ANSI colors
  [93m--profile <name>[39m     Use a named profile (isolates OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR/OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH under ~/.openclaw-<name>)
  [93m-V, --version[39m        output the version number

[1m[91mCommands:[39m[22m
  [31mHint: commands suffixed with * have subcommands. Run <command> --help for details.[39m
  [91macp *[39m                Agent Control Protocol tools
  [91magent[39m                Run one agent turn via the Gateway
  [91magents *[39m             Manage isolated agents (workspaces, auth, routing)
  [91mapprovals *[39m          Manage exec approvals (gateway or node host)
  [91mbackup *[39m             Create and verify local backup archives for OpenClaw state
  [91mchannels *[39m           Manage connected chat channels (Telegram, Discord, etc.)
  [91mclawbot *[39m            Legacy clawbot command aliases
  [91mcompletion[39m           Generate shell completion script
  [91mconfig *[39m             Non-interactive config helpers (get/set/unset/file/validate). Default: starts guided setup.
  [91mconfigure[39m            Interactive configuration for credentials, channels, gateway, and agent defaults
  [91mcron *[39m               Manage cron jobs via the Gateway scheduler
  [91mdaemon *[39m             Gateway service (legacy alias)
  [91mdashboard[39m            Open the Control UI with your current token
  [91mdevices *[39m            Device pairing + token management
  [91mdirectory *[39m          Lookup contact and group IDs (self, peers, groups) for supported chat channels
  [91mdns *[39m                DNS helpers for wide-area discovery (Tailscale + CoreDNS)
  [91mdocs[39m                 Search the live OpenClaw docs
  [91mdoctor[39m               Health checks + quick fixes for the gateway and channels
  [91mgateway *[39m            Run, inspect, and query the WebSocket Gateway
  [91mhealth[39m               Fetch health from the running gateway
  [91mhelp[39m                 Display help for command
  [91mhooks *[39m              Manage internal agent hooks
  [91mlogs[39m                 Tail gateway file logs via RPC
  [91mmemory[39m               Search, inspect, and reindex memory files
  [91mmessage *[39m            Send, read, and manage messages
  [91mmodels *[39m             Discover, scan, and configure models
  [91mnode *[39m               Run and manage the headless node host service
  [91mnodes *[39m              Manage gateway-owned node pairing and node commands
  [91monboard[39m              Interactive onboarding for gateway, workspace, and skills
  [91mpairing *[39m            Secure DM pairing (approve inbound requests)
  [91mplugins *[39m            Manage OpenClaw plugins and extensions
  [91mqr[39m                   Generate iOS pairing QR/setup code
  [91mreset[39m                Reset local config/state (keeps the CLI installed)
  [91msandbox *[39m            Manage sandbox containers for agent isolation
  [91msecrets *[39m            Secrets runtime reload controls
  [91msecurity *[39m           Security tools and local config audits
  [91msessions *[39m           List stored conversation sessions
  [91msetup[39m                Initialize local config and agent workspace
  [91mskills *[39m             List and inspect available skills
  [91mstatus[39m               Show channel health and recent session recipients
  [91msystem *[39m             System events, heartbeat, and presence
  [91mtasks *[39m              Inspect durable background task state
  [91mtui[39m                  Open a terminal UI connected to the Gateway
  [91muninstall[39m            Uninstall the gateway service + local data (CLI remains)
  [91mupdate *[39m             Update OpenClaw and inspect update channel status
  [91mwebhooks *[39m           Webhook helpers and integrations

[1m[91mExamples:[39m[22m
  [91mopenclaw models --help[39m
    [31mShow detailed help for the models command.[39m
  [91mopenclaw channels login --verbose[39m
    [31mLink personal WhatsApp Web and show QR + connection logs.[39m
  [91mopenclaw message send --target +15555550123 --message "Hi" --json[39m
    [31mSend via your web session and print JSON result.[39m
  [91mopenclaw gateway --port 18789[39m
    [31mRun the WebSocket Gateway locally.[39m
  [91mopenclaw --dev gateway[39m
    [31mRun a dev Gateway (isolated state/config) on ws://127.0.0.1:19001.[39m
  [91mopenclaw gateway --force[39m
    [31mKill anything bound to the default gateway port, then start it.[39m
  [91mopenclaw gateway ...[39m
    [31mGateway control via WebSocket.[39m
  [91mopenclaw agent --to +15555550123 --message "Run summary" --deliver[39m
    [31mTalk directly to the agent using the Gateway; optionally send the WhatsApp reply.[39m
  [91mopenclaw message send --channel telegram --target @mychat --message "Hi"[39m
    [31mSend via your Telegram bot.[39m

[31mDocs:[39m ]8;;https://docs.openclaw.ai/clidocs.openclaw.ai/cli]8;;
